case_title: IN RE: DANIEL LEFFLER et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CANTOR, ANDREW SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR LEFFLER, DANIEL

MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-27-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

DEPT. 501: PETITIONERS DANIEL LEFFLER AND ELIZABETH LI'S MOTION FOR ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

NTC OF MTN FOR PETITION RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES, AND MTN FOR PETITION RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER LEFFLER, DANIEL LI, ELIZABETH HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER LEFFLER, DANIEL LI, ELIZABETH
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER LEFFLER, DANIEL LI, ELIZABETH

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS DANIEL LEFFLER AND ELIZABETH LI'S PETITION RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES, AND MOTION FOR PETITION RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN AND FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT PURSUANT TO SFLR 8.10, AND CONTINUED TO JUNE 27, 2014 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 13, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees, And Mtn For Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS DANIEL LEFFLER and ELIZABETH LI's Motion For Order Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Ntc Of Mtn For Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees, And Mtn For Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Jun-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS DANIEL LEFFLER AND ELIZABETH LI'S Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees, And Motion For Petition Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien And For Reasonable Attorney Fees is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court pursuant to SFLR 8.10, and continued to June 27, 2014 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 13, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
